blocks.text: Glimt stand on the edge of Norwegian football history
A 3-1 first-leg lead. San Siro awaits on Tuesday. What Bodø/Glimt are doing has the football world in disbelief — Norway's greatest Champions League night is within reach.

blocks.label: ⚽ Champions League — Wednesday
items: ⚽ 18:45 Atalanta vs Dortmund — Atalanta need two goals, Dortmund heavy favourites to progress
⚽ 21:00 PSG vs Monaco — PSG lead 3-2, but one Monaco away goal levels the tie
⚽ 21:00 Real Madrid vs Benfica — Benfica hunting Madrid's narrow first-leg lead
